Name-Code: Stock Price
Earnings per share [(Net profit - Preferred stock dividends) / Average number of common shares outstanding]
Current P/E ratio [P/E market price per share / earnings per share] less than 13 is undervalued; 14-20 is normal stock price; greater than 28 is speculation
Price-to-book ratio [P/B market price per share / net asset value per share]
Book Value per Share (Book Value per Share) [Total Shareholders' Equity / Number of Outstanding Common Shares]
Dividend Yield [ (Total Cash Dividends - Preferred Stock Dividends) / Total Common Shares ]
Total Market Value
Highest Point
Historical bottom P/E ratio
Historical bottom price-to-book ratio
Historical bottom dividend yield
Predicted Profit for the Next Year
Future one-year P/E ratio
Future Two-Year Forecasted Profit
Future two-year P/E ratio

PEG [Earnings per Share / Net Profit Growth Rate, better when less than 0.5, overvalued when greater than 1, applicable to growth industries; not suitable for mature industries, loss-making industries, and industries with declining earnings]
Return on Net Assets 15% (ORE, Return on Equity, Return on Owner's Equity)
Net profit margin 5% (PMS = Net profit / Net operating revenue)
Gross profit margin 40% [(Net operating revenue - Operating cost)/Net operating revenue]
